lines.gurmukhi: ਗੜ ਮੰਦਰ ਮਹਲਾ ਕਹਾ ਜਿਉ ਬਾਜੀ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: garr mandar mahalaa kahaa jiau baajee deebaan |
lines.english: So where are their forts, mansions, palaces and courts? They are like a short story.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਿ ਮੁਏ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: meree meree kar mue vin naavai dukh bhaal |
lines.english: Crying out, "Mine, mine!", they have died, but without the Name, they find only pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਣੁ ਝੂਠਾ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sache naam vin jhootthaa aavan jaan |
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Name, the false just come and go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਚਤੁਰੁ ਸਰੂਪੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: aape chatur saroop hai aape jaan sujaan |42|
lines.english: He Himself is clever and so very beautiful; He Himself is wise and all-knowing. ||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਜਨ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: se jan ubare jin har bhaaeaa |
lines.english: They alone are saved, who love the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਘਟੈ ਨ ਵਧੈ ਉਤਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh medanee ghattai na vadhai utaeh |
lines.english: They will pass through 8.4 millions species; this number does not decrease or rise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਆਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਜਾਹਿ ਫੁਨਿ ਆਇ ਗਏ ਪਛੁਤਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo aaveh se jaeh fun aae ge pachhutaeh |
lines.english: Those who come, must go in the end; they come and go, regretting and repenting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਦੀਸੈ ਸੋ ਚਾਲਸੀ ਕਿਸ ਕਉ ਮੀਤੁ ਕਰੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo deesai so chaalasee kis kau meet kareo |
lines.english: Whoever is seen, shall depart; who should I make my friend?

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਮੁਆ ਵਿਗੂਤੀ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa muaa vigootee maaeaa |
lines.english: Their worldly entanglements are ended, and Maya is conquered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਸਮਪਉ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਆਗੈ ਦੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo sampau aapanaa tan man aagai deo |
lines.english: I dedicate my soul, and place my body and mind in offering before Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਤੂ ਧਣੀ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਕੀ ਮੈ ਓਟ ॥
lines.translit: asathir karataa too dhanee tis hee kee mai ott |
lines.english: You are eternally stable, O Creator, Lord and Master; I lean on Your Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਕੀ ਮਾਰੀ ਹਉ ਮੁਈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੀ ਮਨਿ ਚੋਟ ॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: gun kee maaree hau muee sabad ratee man chott |43|
lines.english: Conquered by virtue, egotism is killed; imbued with the Word of the Shabad, the mind rejects the world. ||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਰੀ ਆਪੋ ਆਪਣੀ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਬੰਧੈ ਧੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: vaaree aapo aapanee koe na bandhai dheer |
lines.english: When one's turn comes, no one can stay here.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਣਾ ਰਾਉ ਨ ਕੋ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਤੁੰਗੁ ਫਕੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: raanaa raau na ko rahai rang na tung fakeer |
lines.english: Neither the kings nor the nobles will remain; neither the rich nor the poor will remain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਤਨਿ ਅਵਗਣ ਝੁਰਿ ਮੁਈ ਵਿਣੁ ਗੁਣ ਕਿਉ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: mai tan avagan jhur muee vin gun kiau ghar jaah |
lines.english: My body is filled with faults; I am dying of grief. Without virtue, how can I enter my home?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਹੁ ਬੁਰਾ ਭੀਹਾਵਲਾ ਸਰ ਡੂਗਰ ਅਸਗਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: raahu buraa bheehaavalaa sar ddoogar asagaah |
lines.english: The path is difficult and treacherous; the pools and mountains are impassable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਜੈਸੀ ਥੀ ਰਹਾਂ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tin hee jaisee thee rahaan jap jap ridai muraar |
lines.english: If ony I could be like them, chanting and meditating within my heart on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣੀਆ ਗੁਣ ਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲੇ ਕਿਉ ਤਿਨ ਮਿਲਉ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guneea gun le prabh mile kiau tin milau piaar |
lines.english: The virtuous take virtue, and meet God; how can I meet them with love?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗੁਣੀ ਭਰਪੂਰ ਹੈ ਗੁਣ ਭੀ ਵਸਹਿ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: avagunee bharapoor hai gun bhee vaseh naal |
lines.english: He is overflowing with faults and demerits, but virtue dwells within him as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਗੁਣ ਨ ਜਾਪਨੀ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: vin satagur gun na jaapanee jichar sabad na kare beechaar |44|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, he does not see God's Virtues; he does not chant the Glorious Virtues of God. ||44||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਸਕਰੀਆ ਘਰ ਸੰਮਲੇ ਆਏ ਵਜਹੁ ਲਿਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lasakareea ghar samale aae vajahu likhaae |
lines.english: God's soldiers take care of their homes; their pay is pre-ordained, before they come into the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਿਰਿ ਧਣੀ ਲਾਹਾ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaar kamaaveh sir dhanee laahaa palai paae |
lines.english: They serve their Supreme Lord and Master, and obtain the profit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੜਿ ਦੋਹੀ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹ ਕੀ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: garr dohee paatisaah kee kade na aavai haar |
lines.english: In the fortress of the body, they announce the victory of their Supreme King; they are never ever vanquished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਬੁਰਿਆਈਆ ਛੋਡੇ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: lab lobh buriaaeea chhodde manahu visaar |
lines.english: They renounce greed, avarice and evil, and forget them from their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਜਹੁ ਗਵਾਏ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਖਤਿ ਨ ਬੈਸਹਿ ਸੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: vajahu gavaae aapanaa takhat na baiseh see |
lines.english: shall forfeit his pay, and not be seated upon the throne.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਕਰੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਸਉਹੇ ਉਤਰ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: chaakar kaheeai khasam kaa sauhe utar dee |
lines.english: One who calls himself a servant of his Lord and Master, and yet speaks defiantly to Him,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਖੀਐ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: aap kare kis aakheeai avar na koe karee |45|
lines.english: He Himself does everything; who else should we address? No one else does anything. ||45||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਹਥਿ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: preetam hath vaddiaaeea jai bhaavai tai dee |
lines.english: Glorious greatness rests in the hands of my Beloved; He gives, according to the Pleasure of His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕ ਨਿਵਾਰਣੁ ਨਰਹ ਨਰੁ ਸਾਚਉ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: narak nivaaran narah nar saachau saachai naae |
lines.english: The Supreme Man of men eradicates hell; He is True, and True is His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਣੁ ਢੂਢਤ ਫਿਰਿ ਰਹੀ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਕਰਉ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: van trin dtoodtat fir rahee man meh krau beechaar |
lines.english: I wandered around searching for Him in the forests and meadows; I contemplate Him within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਜਉ ਸੂਝੈ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਬਹੈ ਦੁਲੀਚਾ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: beejau soojhai ko nahee bahai duleechaa paae |
lines.english: I cannot conceive of any other, who could be seated upon the royal cushions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਤਮੁ ਹੋਵਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਏਕੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aootam hovaa prabh milai ik man ekai bhaae |
lines.english: Meeting with God, I am exalted and elevated; I love the One Lord single-mindedly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲ ਰਤਨ ਬਹੁ ਮਾਣਕੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਹਾਥਿ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: laal ratan bahu maanakee satigur haath bhanddaar |
lines.english: The treasures of myriads of pearls, jewels and emeralds are in the hands of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਚਨਾ ਰਾਚਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਚੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: rachanaa raach jin rachee jin siriaa aakaar |
lines.english: He who created and formed the creation, made your form as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਰਸਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਲਾਹਾ ਲੈ ਪਰਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak preetam ras mile laahaa lai parathaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, one who lovingly meets with his Beloved, earns profit in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh beant dhiaaeeai ant na paaraavaar |46|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, meditate on the Infinite Lord, who has no end or limitation. ||46||

lines.gurmukhi: ੜਾੜੈ ਰੂੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: rraarrai roorraa har jeeo soee |
lines.english: Rharha: The Dear Lord is beautiful;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਤੁ ਕੋ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee har paaeeai mat ko bharam bhulaeh |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one finds the Lord; do not be deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਰਾਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin raajaa avar na koee |
lines.english: There is no other king, except Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ੜਾੜੈ ਗਾਰੁੜੁ ਤੁਮ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: rraarrai gaarurr tum sunahu har vasai man maeh |
lines.english: Rharha: Listen to the spell, and the Lord will come to dwell in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh pooraa tis saabaas |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is perfect - applaud him!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਾਹੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: so saahu saachaa jis har dhan raas |
lines.english: He alone is the true banker, who has the capital of the wealth of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂੜੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: roorree baanee har paaeaa gurasabadee beechaar |
lines.english: Through the beautiful Word of the Guru's Bani, the Lord is obtained; contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
